---
title: "[논문리뷰] Artificial gamma ray spectra simulation using Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) and Supervised Generative Networks (SGNs)"
author: "류지창"
date: "2023-09-23"
categories: [논문리뷰, 생성모델]
toc: false
# image:
---

> [Paper](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0168900222010877) \
> Felipe M.F. de Oliveira, G. Daniel, O. Limousin \
> February 2023 \

## Abstract


## Introduction
